Careers

Gentec International is a recognized leader in the Consumer Electronics market place and was most recently named one of Canada’s Best Managed Companies.  We have been in business since 1990 sourcing and distributing numerous accessory brands in addition to developing strong aftermarket brands of our own.  Our client list includes major CE Retailers, Mass Merchants and independent Retailers across Canada.

We offer competitive compensation, an on-site gym, comprehensive Health benefits, a RRSP package and a friendly and supportive “Gentec family” atmosphere where your contributions are recognised and awarded.

We’re looking forward to hearing from you!

Current Opportunities

ABOUT GENTEC

Together we achieve the extraordinary - built on a strong level of partnership with our retail and supply chain partners, we strive to innovate both logistically and in the types of market savvy products with international brand recognition that we carry.
